requirement_topic.en: SKELEC / NEVLEC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and SKELEC / NEVLEC Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SKELEC / NEVLEC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及SKELEC / NEVLEC并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: SKELEC / NEVLEC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及SKELEC / NEVLEC併網要求

summary.en: Saint Kitts and Nevis electricity supply is served by St Kitts Electricity Company (SKELEC) on Saint Kitts and Nevis Electricity Company (NEVLEC) on Nevis. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale renewable-plus-storage projects and behind-the-meter commercial systems — require utility technical review and grid-connection approval from the relevant utility, with Nevis projects also engaging the Nevis Island Administration where applicable. Saint Kitts and Nevis operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — sharing the 50 Hz frequency with China but running at a different nominal voltage (China is 220/380 V). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must therefore be configured and validated for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. SKELEC and NEVLEC project-scale requirements are expected to be defined in individual interconnection agreements. IEC 62933 series standards (Electrical Energy Storage Systems), including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems), are internationally expected references for BESS projects seeking SKELEC / NEVLEC connection approval. No publicly accessible SKELEC / NEVLEC BESS-specific grid-connection technical specification was confirmed as of the dataset date; direct engagement with the relevant utility is required at the earliest project stage.
summary.zh: 圣基茨和尼维斯电力供应在圣基茨由St Kitts Electricity Company（SKELEC）服务，在尼维斯由Nevis Electricity Company（NEVLEC）服务。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模的可再生能源加储能项目和工商业表后系统——均须取得相关公用事业公司的技术审查和并网批准；尼维斯项目还应在适用时与尼维斯岛行政机构沟通。圣基茨和尼维斯电网运行参数为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz——与中国同为50 Hz，但标称电压不同（中国为220/380 V）。因此，BESS储能变流器（PCS）须针对230/400 V、50 Hz进行配置和验证。SKELEC和NEVLEC的项目级要求预计将在个别并网协议中规定。IEC 62933系列标准（电化学储能系统），包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求），是寻求SKELEC / NEVLEC并网批准的BESS项目的国际预期参考依据。截至本数据集日期，未能确认SKELEC / NEVLEC公开发布专门针对BESS的并网技术规格文件；须在项目最早阶段直接与相关公用事业公司接触。
summary.zht: 聖基茨和尼維斯電力供應在聖基茨由St Kitts Electricity Company（SKELEC）服務，在尼維斯由Nevis Electricity Company（NEVLEC）服務。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模的可再生能源加儲能項目和工商業表後系統——均須取得相關公用事業公司的技術審查和併網批准；尼維斯項目還應在適用時與尼維斯島行政機構溝通。聖基茨和尼維斯電網運行參數為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz——與中國同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同（中國為220/380 V）。因此，BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須針對230/400 V、50 Hz進行配置和驗證。SKELEC和NEVLEC的項目級要求預計將在個別併網協議中規定。IEC 62933系列標準（電化學儲能系統），包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求），是尋求SKELEC / NEVLEC併網批准的BESS項目的國際預期參考依據。截至本數據集日期，未能確認SKELEC / NEVLEC公開發布專門針對BESS的併網技術規格文件；須在項目最早階段直接與相關公用事業公司接觸。

standards_or_laws: SKELEC / NEVLEC interconnection requirements — technical requirements for customer-owned generation and storage assets connected to the relevant Saint Kitts and Nevis distribution network
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)

SKELEC / NEVLEC utility connection approval — verify current BESS grid-connection requirements directly with the relevant utility and, for Nevis projects, the Nevis Island Administration where applicable
Saint Kitts and Nevis grid parameters: 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Although Saint Kitts and Nevis shares the 50 Hz frequency, the voltage differs — Saint Kitts and Nevis is 230/400 V versus China's 220/380 V. PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive-power regulation parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be reconfigured and retested for Saint Kitts and Nevis's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid before grid-connection testing and commissioning. GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not recognised by SKELEC / NEVLEC.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。尽管圣基茨和尼维斯同为50 Hz频率，但电压不同——圣基茨和尼维斯为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和无功功率调节参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对圣基茨和尼维斯230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行配置和重新测试。GB/T并网证书和NEA审批不被SKELEC / NEVLEC认可。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。儘管聖基茨和尼維斯同為50 Hz頻率，但電壓不同——聖基茨和尼維斯為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和無功功率調節參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對聖基茨和尼維斯230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行配置和重新測試。GB/T併網證書和NEA審批不被SKELEC / NEVLEC認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy SKELEC / NEVLEC grid-connection requirements in Saint Kitts and Nevis. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Saint Kitts and Nevis is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; although the frequency is identically 50 Hz, PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and independently retested for Saint Kitts and Nevis's grid; (b) SKELEC / NEVLEC DG Interconnection Policy compliance — obtain SKELEC / NEVLEC's current technical requirements before equipment design is finalised, as requirements may evolve with Saint Kitts and Nevis's growing solar-plus-storage deployment; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project or SKELEC / NEVLEC specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) coastal and hurricane derating — Saint Kitts and Nevis's tropical maritime climate requires attention to salt-mist corrosion resistance (IEC 60068-2-52 or equivalent) and wind-load design for hurricane-force events (wind speeds exceeding 150 km/h are plausible for Category 3+ storms); enclosures and structural mountings must be designed accordingly; (e) SCADA and communication protocols — confirm SKELEC / NEVLEC's interface protocol requirements for BESS monitoring and dispatch before equipment procurement.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足圣基茨和尼维斯SKELEC / NEVLEC并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——圣基茨和尼维斯为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；尽管频率同为50 Hz，但PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并针对圣基茨和尼维斯电网进行独立重新测试；（b）SKELEC / NEVLEC分布式发电并网政策合规——在设备设计最终确定前取得SKELEC / NEVLEC现行技术要求，因随圣基茨和尼维斯太阳能加储能部署增加，要求可能持续演变；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目或SKELEC / NEVLEC规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）沿海及飓风降额——圣基茨和尼维斯热带海洋气候要求关注盐雾腐蚀防护（IEC 60068-2-52或等效标准）及针对飓风级别事件的风荷载设计（3级以上飓风风速可超过150 km/h）；外壳和结构安装须相应设计；（e）SCADA及通信协议——在设备采购前确认SKELEC / NEVLEC对BESS监控和调度的接口协议要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足聖基茨和尼維斯SKELEC / NEVLEC併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——聖基茨和尼維斯為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；儘管頻率同為50 Hz，但PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並針對聖基茨和尼維斯電網進行獨立重新測試；（b）SKELEC / NEVLEC分布式發電併網政策合規——在設備設計最終確定前取得SKELEC / NEVLEC現行技術要求，因隨聖基茨和尼維斯太陽能加儲能部署增加，要求可能持續演變；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目或SKELEC / NEVLEC規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）沿海及颶風降額——聖基茨和尼維斯熱帶海洋氣候要求關注鹽霧腐蝕防護（IEC 60068-2-52或等效標準）及針對颶風級別事件的風荷載設計（3級以上颶風風速可超過150 km/h）；外殼和結構安裝須相應設計；（e）SCADA及通訊協議——在設備採購前確認SKELEC / NEVLEC對BESS監控和調度的接口協議要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SKELEC or NEVLEC grid-connection approval is required for grid-connected BESS in Saint Kitts and Nevis; technical requirements are project-specific and defined by the relevant utility interconnection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Saint Kitts and Nevis

source.publisher: St Kitts Electricity Company (SKELEC) and Nevis Electricity Company (NEVLEC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy SKELEC / NEVLEC grid-connection requirements in Saint Kitts and Nevis. Although China and Saint Kitts and Nevis share 50 Hz, the grid voltage differs (China 220/380 V vs Saint Kitts and Nevis 230/400 V) — BESS PCS must be re-parameterised and retested for Saint Kitts and Nevis's 230/400 V grid. Additional Saint Kitts and Nevis-specific factors include hurricane wind-load design, salt-mist corrosion resistance, and alignment with SKELEC / NEVLEC's DG Interconnection Policy. Engage SKELEC / NEVLEC at the earliest project stage. No publicly accessible SKELEC / NEVLEC technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足圣基茨和尼维斯SKELEC / NEVLEC并网要求。尽管中国与圣基茨和尼维斯同为50 Hz，但电网电压不同（中国220/380 V vs 圣基茨和尼维斯230/400 V）——BESS储能变流器须重新针对圣基茨和尼维斯230/400 V电网进行参数配置和重新测试。圣基茨和尼维斯的其他特殊因素还包括飓风风荷载设计、盐雾腐蚀防护，以及符合SKELEC / NEVLEC分布式发电并网政策的要求。须在项目最早阶段与SKELEC / NEVLEC接触。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SKELEC / NEVLEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足聖基茨和尼維斯SKELEC / NEVLEC併網要求。儘管中國與聖基茨和尼維斯同為50 Hz，但電網電壓不同（中國220/380 V vs 聖基茨和尼維斯230/400 V）——BESS儲能變流器須重新針對聖基茨和尼維斯230/400 V電網進行參數配置和重新測試。聖基茨和尼維斯的其他特殊因素還包括颶風風荷載設計、鹽霧腐蝕防護，以及符合SKELEC / NEVLEC分布式發電併網政策的要求。須在項目最早階段與SKELEC / NEVLEC接觸。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SKELEC / NEVLEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接接觸至關重要。
